_meta.description: Crew mechanics: faction conflicts, satiety bonuses, special unit acquisition, hire limits, reload formulas

factionConflicts.description: Special unit class conflicts - conflicting units cannot serve on the same ship

satietyBonuses.description: Bonuses applied when crew is fully fed (satiety at max)

weaponsReloadByCrew.description: Cannon reload speed factor based on crew ratio
weaponsReloadByCrew.formula: n + n*(1-n)/2 * 0.75 where n = currentCrew / maxCrew

reinforcedPirate.improvedCondition: Player has ≤ 6 total special units (storage + ships)

chanseMultiplier.note: Diminishing returns: fewer new units drop when you have many

newUnitBias.description: When acquiring units, system biases toward units you don't already own

npcCrewComposition.description: NPC ships crew is generated with: 50% sailors (unit 1), 25% random boarding type, 25% another boarding type
npcCrewComposition.formula: Sailors: round(total/2), Type1: round(total/4), Type2: round(total/4)

crewHirePrice.formula: lerp(2 * goldCost, goldCost, min(1, 1.2 * currentCount / limit))
crewHirePrice.note: Price decreases as port has more available crew
